synthesis.driver: Escalating US-Iran strikes near Hormuz raise war-risk premium, pushing Brent up $3.86 despite global oversupply capping larger spikes.

takes.iran war live us and iran exchange deadl: Ongoing US-Iran attacks sustain upward pressure on Brent as war-risk premium rises.

takes.the u s iran battle over the strait of h: Heightened risks to global shipping lanes add to war premium, lifting Brent prices.
